# Sensa Wellness

> Sensa is an at-home CRP (C-reactive protein) inflammation test kit. You run a simple saliva-based vial test at home, scan the cuvette with the Sensa mobile app, and get a 0 to 100 inflammation score in about 15 minutes. No needles and no clinic visit. Sensa is a general wellness product for tracking inflammation trends over time, not a medical diagnostic device.

Key facts:
- Product: at-home inflammation (CRP) test kit with a companion scanning app
- How it works: run the vial test, scan it with the app, receive a 0 to 100 inflammation score
- Results: about 15 minutes, at home, no needles, no lab visit
- Pricing: $49 single kit, $99 three-pack, $129 four-pack
- Web app: https://app.sensawellness.org
- Positioning: general wellness and lifestyle tracking, not diagnosis or treatment of disease

## Core Pages
- [Homepage](https://www.sensawellness.org/): what Sensa is, how it works, pricing
- [What is CRP?](https://www.sensawellness.org/what-is-crp.html): plain-language explanation of C-reactive protein
- [How to Use Sensa](https://www.sensawellness.org/how-to.html): step-by-step testing guide
- [The Sensa App](https://www.sensawellness.org/app.html): how the scanning app produces your score
- [Buy a Kit](https://www.sensawellness.org/pay-now.html): kits and pricing
- [Our Story](https://www.sensawellness.org/our-story.html): why Sensa was built
